zh.Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德
zh.Walton, Derbyshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾沃爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Foljambe於1476年出生在英國德比夏爾沃爾頓時，他的父親Henry Foljambe Esq.34歲，母親Benedicta Vernon34歲。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1529年享年53歲。

zh-hans.Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德
zh-hans.Walton, Derbyshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰德比夏爾沃爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Foljambe于1476年出生在英国德比夏爾沃爾頓时，他的父亲Henry Foljambe Esq.34岁，母亲Benedicta Vernon34岁。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1529年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Foljambe was born in 1476, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry Foljambe Esq., was 34 and his mother, Benedicta Vernon, was 34. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1529, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Foljambe est né en 1476, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Foljambe Esq., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Benedicta Vernon, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1529, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Foljambe 1476 in Walton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Foljambe Esq. 34 und seine Mutter Benedicta Vernon 34. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1529 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Foljambe è nato il nel 1476 nel Walton, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Foljambe Esq., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Benedicta Vernon, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1529, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールド
ja.Walton, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトン

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Foljambeが1476年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父Henry Foljambe Esq.は34歳，母Benedicta Vernonは34歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1529年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Foljambe(이)가 1476년 영국 더비실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Foljambe Esq.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Benedicta Vernon(은)는 34세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Walton, Derbyshire, England, United King: Walton, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Foljambe nasceu em 1476, em Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Foljambe Esq., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta Vernon, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1529, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Foljambe родился в 1476 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Foljambe Esq. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Benedicta Vernon, 34. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1529 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Foljambe nació en 1476, en Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Foljambe Esq., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Benedicta Vernon, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1529, a la edad de 53 años.
